name: Peach Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese in a bowl using an electric mixer set on medium speed until smooth.
2. Gradually add the eggs, 1/2 cup of sugar, milk, and vanilla, beating well after each addition.
3. Pour into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Bake in a 375°F oven for 30 minutes or until set. Cool on a wire rack.
5. Drain the peaches, reserving 1 cup of juice.
6. In a small saucepan, combine cornstarch and 1/4 cup sugar.
7. Gradually stir in the reserved peach juice, lemon juice, and almond extract.
8. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and thickens.
9. Remove from the heat. Arrange the peaches in a circle, petal fashion, on top of the filling.
10. Garnish with maraschino cherries. Spoon the glaze over the fruit.
11. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least one hour or until set.
